summary: Stunning performance with emotive vocals, jazzy‑pop vibes and powerful drumming captured on a crisp soundboard recording.
review: The reviewer describes this show as absolutely stunning – full of emotion, sweet vocal improvisation, haunting moments and a joyous blend of jazz, pop and pain. Drums are highlighted as “potent and powerful,” and the overall musicianship is praised as magical. No specific technical issues are noted, suggesting the soundboard source delivers clear audio.

ai_rating.rationale: One glowing 5‑star review praises both performance and implied recording quality; limited data leads to a conservative confidence level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound, but the soundboard source is assumed clear and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review highlights emotive vocal improv, joyful and haunting passages, and a diverse mix of jazz, pop, and blues throughout the set.

band_member_comments.Drums: Described as potent and powerful, adding major impact to the performance.
